scripts.build: bun build --compile apps/cli/src/main.ts --outfile dist/boilerhouse && bun build --compile apps/trigger-gateway/src/server.ts --outfile dist/trigger-gateway && bun build --compile apps/dashboard/src/server.ts --outfile dist/dashboard
scripts.dev: bun run --filter '@boilerhouse/api' dev & bun run --filter '@boilerhouse/dashboard' dev
